name: Model Router
description: Route prompts to different models/providers via before_model_resolve hook. Enable P0 model selection intelligence.

defaultModel.description: Default model when no rules match

defaultProvider.description: Default provider when no rules match

rules.description: Routing rules evaluated in order; first match wins

keywords.description: Keywords to match in prompt (OR logic)

model.description: Model ID to route to when matched

provider.description: Provider ID to route to when matched (optional)
